title: PCR Prep and Pooling with 384 Plates - Stage 3
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol is Stage 3 of a 3 part PCR Prep protocol. Parts 1 and 2 can be found below. For detailed protocol details, please reference the "Protocol Steps" section. [Stage 1 Protocol](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/08fd01) [Stage 2 Protocol](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/08fd01-pt2) ---
